name: Intra-Episode Telemetry Investigation
status: COMPLETE — N.2 (binary strings) and N.1 (schema probes) both completed.

N1_schema_scan.findings: All three probes produced standard 6-field receipts ({asymmetry, coherence, decision, delta_E, duration_ms, episode}) with no new telemetry fields. Per-step telemetry confirmed blocked — no user-accessible intra-episode emission regardless of flag combination.

findings.state_update_equation: state_out = state_in + dt * (output - state_in) — relaxation dynamic
findings.energy_model: EbmCalibration + XnorSampler — energy-based model with XNOR binary sampling
findings.gpu_compute: wgpu with fused transformer kernel (Q, K, V in shared memory)
findings.per_step_telemetry: NOT AVAILABLE — no user-accessible per-step emission found
